pi_items.source: Docker volume configuration in setup_mssql.sh: /home/ga/mssql/backup:/backup maps to /backup inside container

Official Microsoft SQL Server sample database. Verified from: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/samples/adventureworks-install-configure?view=sql-server-ver17 and setup_mssql.sh RESTORE DATABASE statement
AdventureWorks2022.bak from Microsoft GitHub releases is approximately 883 MB. Verified from GitHub releases page. The metadata claim of 100 MB minimum is reasonable for this database.

pi_items.metadata_value: Use T-SQL BACKUP DATABASE and RESTORE VERIFYONLY commands
pi_items.verified_value: Use T-SQL BACKUP DATABASE and RESTORE VERIFYONLY commands
pi_items.source: Official SQL Server documentation confirms these are the standard T-SQL commands for database backup and verification

privileged_info_summary: The task uses AdventureWorks2022, the official Microsoft SQL Server OLTP sample database (approximately 883 MB when backed up). The backup destination is /backup/AdventureWorks2022_backup.bak. The minimum backup size threshold of 100 MB is reasonable given the database size. The task requires standard SQL Server T-SQL commands: BACKUP DATABASE for creating the backup and RESTORE VERIFYONLY for validation. All metadata claims are accurate and consistent with the actual configuration.
